ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "cad_cash" REAL /* Amount in CAD cash (assets) */,
  "usd_cash" REAL /* Amount in USD cash (assets) */,
  "usd_inventory" REAL /* Amount in USD cash inventory */,
  "initial_capital" REAL /* Initial capital in CAD */,
  "food_expense" REAL /* Food expense in CAD */,
  "exchange_gain" REAL /* Exchange gain/loss in CAD */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., cash movement, exchange, investment, expense) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific investment or expense entry */,
  "revaluation_amount" REAL /* Revaluation amount based on current exchange rates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_reference_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_id") REFERENCES expenses ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_reference_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Three-letter currency code (e.g., CAD, USD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate against a base currency */,
  "base_currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the base currency against which the exchange rate is measured */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the currency details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount invested */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency of investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of investment */,
  "investment_description" TEXT /* Description of the investment */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., equity, bond, real estate) */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date for fixed-term investments */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the investment (e.g., active, sold, matured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "expense_amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency of the expense */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date of the expense */,
  "expense_category" TEXT /* Category of the expense (e.g., Food, Operations) */,
  "expense_type" TEXT /* Type of expense (e.g., operational, travel, marketing) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the expense */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_history" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange transaction */,
  "from_currency_id" INTEGER /* Currency being exchanged from */,
  "to_currency_id" INTEGER /* Currency being exchanged to */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate applied */,
  "exchange_date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction associated with the exchange */,
  "amount_exchanged" REAL /* Amount exchanged from one currency to another */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_history_from_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_history_to_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_balances" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency of the account */,
  "balance_amount" REAL /* Current balance amount in the specified currency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the account balance was last updated */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings, investment) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the account belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_balances_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_balances_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view transaction) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, published) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate entry */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency being tracked */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate for the currency */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the exchange rate became effective */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate data (e.g., central bank, financial API) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of exchange rate updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currency_rates_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)
